If you’re serious about building something real…

NO necesitas inventar nada.

La verdad es que para tener resultados con dropshipping es mucho más simple de lo que imaginas. 

No necesitas invertir en la creación de nuevos productos ni pasar horas buscando ideas de productos innovadoras. 

La clave es identificar productos que ya están en alta demanda y aplicar una estrategia inteligente para venderlos de manera atractiva. 

Si estás listo para aprender cómo encontrar y aprovechar productos ganadores en el dropshipping, comenta “GUÍA” y te enviaré los pasos que necesitas seguir para alcanzar el éxito en este negocio.

#guia #dropshipping #ecommerce #ventas #online

body.text:
❗️WISH I DONE THIS SOONER❗️

I spent 14 years in construction, working long hours and feeling stuck.

Then one evening, I came across a video talking about online income streams. I almost scrolled past it (because let’s be real, most of these things seem too good to be true). But something made me stop and watch... and that decision changed everything.

Fast forward—I've built an online business that allows me to work from anywhere, have more time for my family, and finally live life on my terms.

And here’s the thing—I’m not tech-savvy, and I didn’t have any experience. I just followed a proven system, step by step.

If you want to learn how this all works, I’m sharing everything I learned that helped me. Things like... 

✅ Affiliate Marketing (How I got started)
✅ E-commerce & Drop-shipping
✅ Digital Products & Coaching
✅ Online Advertising & More...

No fluff. No fake promises. Just real, actionable advice on how to build an online income stream from scratch.

📲 Click the link to get instant access to to my email newsletter.

body.text:
Générer 3000e/mois en ligne en 2024 ? Oubliez ces méthodes :

X Agence de marketing digital
X Community-management
X Marketing d’affiliation
X Amazon FBA
X OU tout autre petit business en ligne que vous voyez partout sur YouTube

Essayer de lancer n’importe laquelle de ces activités est la recette du désespoir.

Au lieu de faire ça..

Pourquoi ne pas se lancer dans une activité avec (pour l'instant) 0 concurrence ?

Une activité avec un potentiel de revenu quasi illimité ?

Le « Lean E-Commerce » vous permet de générer un revenu :

- Stable sur le long terme
- Éthique (Produits de haute qualité)
- Évidemment 100% légal

Et le meilleur ?

- Pas besoin de diplôme
- Pas besoin de compétences informatiques
- Pas besoin de quitter votre emploi actuel

J’ai filmé un tutoriel offert où je montre la méthode pour créer cette activité.

(Je précise que je n’ai rien à vendre dans ce tutoriel pratique, je t’explique même dans la vidéo quel intérêt j’ai à te partager ma méthode).

Už jste viděli nový rozhovor s jedním se zakladatelů AI aplikace Editee, Štěpánem Hlinkou?

✅ Jak ve 21 letech začal podnikat online

✅ Proč si koupil auto za 3 miliony a jaké jsou jeho další plány

A mnohem více!

body.text:
$0 - $400m in 3.5 years. 

That’s how much my AI business was valued just last week. 

But the valuation isn't even the best part. 
The best part is I only work 4 hours a day and I'm currently writing this from Greece, where I'm spending the next two months with my family.

Only three years ago I was a burnt-out corporate employee, working 60+ hours a week just trying to get by.

I never went to college. I am not technical and I thought I had no chance in building a successful business online. 

I looked at everything, SMMA, dropshipping, Amazon - I even looked at crypto. 

But I discovered something that changed everything.
While everyone else was trying to build the next ChatGPT, I found something much simpler: helping everyday businesses implement AI tools that already exist.

I called it AI Arbitrage, and it works like crazy because millions of small businesses are desperate for AI help but have no idea where to start.

The best part? My business mainly runs itself because AI does most of the heavy lifting. 

No inventory, no customer service headaches, just monthly recurring revenue from helping businesses transform their operations.

So if you want to see how this works, how I built my company to $400m and how everyday people are taking advantage of AI to build a 2nd income online that works around their busy schedule then I’ve put together a free training. 

You can check it out for free right now by clicking learn more.

See you there.

body.text:
I Knew I Wanted to Start My Own Business… But Everything Felt Risky - Until I Found This:

If you’re tired of the 9-5 and hunting for the right business to start, this overlooked skill might just change everything.

By Jenna C., Contributor

I knew I wanted to quit my job.
I was sick of trading time for a paycheck.
I wanted ownership, freedom, and work that actually meant something to me.

But every time I Googled “business ideas,” I felt more overwhelmed than before.

Dropshipping? Too saturated.
Coaching? What would I even coach on?
Amazon FBA? Expensive, risky, competitive.
Content creation? I’m not trying to go viral.

Everything felt like either a scam, a slog, or a long shot.

Then one night, buried in a Reddit thread, I saw someone mention something that almost no one talks about:

“Bookkeeping is the ultimate beginner business. Low cost. High demand. Clients who stick with you for years.”

And that’s when everything clicked.

The Business You’ve Probably Never Considered (But Should)

Bookkeeping isn’t flashy.

It’s not sexy.

But it might just be the smartest move no one’s talking about.

When I found the 5-Day Keyboard Rich Challenge, hosted by CPA Bill Von Fumetti, it felt like the missing piece I’d been looking for.

It’s a free, live training where you learn exactly how to start a remote bookkeeping business from scratch - even if you’ve never opened QuickBooks or taken a finance class.

And it’s built specifically for people like me (and probably you):

✅ Career changers
✅ Side hustlers
✅ Aspiring entrepreneurs who want something real
✅ Retirees

What Makes Bookkeeping So Smart?

Let’s be honest. Most online business ideas s..k.
They either take years to monetize, require a massive audience, or rely on unstable platforms.

Bookkeeping is different.

✅ Every business needs one - and many pay monthly
✅ You don’t need to “sell” - clients often come to you if you position it well
✅ Software makes it simple (QuickBooks does the heavy lifting)
✅ Many bookkeepers charge on average $76/h 
✅ With a few consistent clients, you could replace or supplement your income

And the best part? You can start part-time.

Learn the skill, land your first client, then decide if you want to go all-in.

What Happens in the 5-Day Challenge?

This isn’t a webinar. It’s a guided, step-by-step Zoom training.

Each day, you log in for ~90 minutes and unlock a new piece of the blueprint:

Day 1: Why bookkeeping is the best-kept secret in the business world

Day 2: How to use QuickBooks (even if you’ve never touched it before)

Day 3: Set up your business structure & tools

Day 4: Find and land your first 1-3 clients (with no cold calls)

Day 5: How to price, position, and start confidently

It’s free. It’s high-value. And it’s built for people who are done browsing ideas and ready to take action.

Real Stories from Real People:

This challenge has helped over 8,000 people break into the business world with bookkeeping.

No financial degrees. No sales. No fancy setup.

Just a legit, service-based business that grows with you.

Here’s What I Learned (That Changed Everything)

I don’t need a “million-dollar idea.”
I don’t need to go viral.
I don’t need to risk thousands upfront.

I just need to solve a real problem for people who are happy to pay for it - every month.

That’s exactly what bookkeeping lets you do.

👉 Want to See If It’s Right for You?

If you’ve been thinking, “I know I want to start a business… but I don’t know what kind,” this might be your sign.

The next Keyboard Rich 5-Day Challenge starts on Monday

It’s 100% free. 

And it might be the business idea you didn’t even know you were looking for.

🎯 Save your seat here →

https://thebookkeepingchallenge.com/live <<-- click here

Worst case? You spend 90 minutes a day learning a high-value skill.

Best case? You gain the confidence and tools to build a flexible business that fits your life.

text:
I Knew I Wanted to Start My Own Business… But Everything Felt Risky - Until I Found This:

If you’re tired of the 9-5 and hunting for the right business to start, this overlooked skill might just change everything.

By Jenna C., Contributor

I knew I wanted to quit my job.
I was sick of trading time for a paycheck.
I wanted ownership, freedom, and work that actually meant something to me.

But every time I Googled “business ideas,” I felt more overwhelmed than before.

Dropshipping? Too saturated.
Coaching? What would I even coach on?
Amazon FBA? Expensive, risky, competitive.
Content creation? I’m not trying to go viral.

Everything felt like either a scam, a slog, or a long shot.

Then one night, buried in a Reddit thread, I saw someone mention something that almost no one talks about:

“Bookkeeping is the ultimate beginner business. Low cost. High demand. Clients who stick with you for years.”

And that’s when everything clicked.

The Business You’ve Probably Never Considered (But Should)

Bookkeeping isn’t flashy.

It’s not sexy.

But it might just be the smartest move no one’s talking about.

When I found the 5-Day Keyboard Rich Challenge, hosted by CPA Bill Von Fumetti, it felt like the missing piece I’d been looking for.

It’s a free, live training where you learn exactly how to start a remote bookkeeping business from scratch - even if you’ve never opened QuickBooks or taken a finance class.

And it’s built specifically for people like me (and probably you):

✅ Career changers
✅ Side hustlers
✅ Aspiring entrepreneurs who want something real
✅ Retirees

What Makes Bookkeeping So Smart?

Let’s be honest. Most online business ideas s..k.
They either take years to monetize, require a massive audience, or rely on unstable platforms.

Bookkeeping is different.

✅ Every business needs one - and many pay monthly
✅ You don’t need to “sell” - clients often come to you if you position it well
✅ Software makes it simple (QuickBooks does the heavy lifting)
✅ Many bookkeepers charge on average $76/h 
✅ With a few consistent clients, you could replace or supplement your income

And the best part? You can start part-time.

Learn the skill, land your first client, then decide if you want to go all-in.

What Happens in the 5-Day Challenge?

This isn’t a webinar. It’s a guided, step-by-step Zoom training.

Each day, you log in for ~90 minutes and unlock a new piece of the blueprint:

Day 1: Why bookkeeping is the best-kept secret in the business world

Day 2: How to use QuickBooks (even if you’ve never touched it before)

It’s free. It’s high-value. And it’s built for people who are done browsing ideas and ready to take action.

That’s exactly what bookkeeping lets you do.

body.text:
$0 - $400m in 3.5 years. 

That’s how much my AI business was valued just last week. 

But the valuation isn't even the best part. 
The best part is I only work 4 hours a day and I'm currently writing this from Greece, where I'm spending the next two months with my family.

Only three years ago I was a burnt-out corporate employee, working 60+ hours a week just trying to get by.

I never went to college. I am not technical and I thought I had no chance in building a successful business online. 

I looked at everything, SMMA, dropshipping, Amazon - I even looked at crypto. 

But I discovered something that changed everything.
While everyone else was trying to build the next ChatGPT, I found something much simpler: helping everyday businesses implement AI tools that already exist.

I called it AI Arbitrage, and it works like crazy because millions of small businesses are desperate for AI help but have no idea where to start.

The best part? My business mainly runs itself because AI does most of the heavy lifting. 

No inventory, no customer service headaches, just monthly recurring revenue from helping businesses transform their operations.

So if you want to see how this works, how I built my company to $400m and how everyday people are taking advantage of AI to build a 2nd income online that works around their busy schedule then I’ve put together a free training. 

You can check it out for free right now by clicking learn more.

See you there.
